QLD is the 2x leveraged QQQ ETF — in a market environment rated UNDER PRESSURE with SPY below its 50-day MA, leveraged long positions amplify downside risk. QQQ is holding its 50-day MA (positive), but with 2 distribution days and no follow-through, holding leveraged exposure at full size is higher risk than the market environment warrants. Consider reducing to half-size until a follow-through day confirms the market recovery.
